sub_mechanisms: M_1: Dyck path index of each context span
M_2: Catalan upper bound on retrieval search
M_3: balanced-span retrieval via Dyck constraint
stripped_llm_application: Context-span retrieval restricted to balanced-bracket (Dyck) spans; the search-space size is bounded by the Catalan count of valid balanced configurations; lookup prunes invalid (unbalanced) spans via the ballot-rule.
novelty_claim_stripped: KV-cache retrieval methods use semantic/positional/learned scoring; no method restricts retrieval to balanced-bracket Dyck-valid spans with Catalan-bounded search.
